testcase.name: KPI Integrity Dashboard Audits › UI KPI StatCards match database aggregates
RBAC Verification Matrix › STAFF role restrictions and redirects
RBAC Verification Matrix › MANAGER role restrictions and redirects
RBAC Verification Matrix › OWNER role full access permissions
Subscription Feature Gating Matrix › STARTER Plan gates premium features
Subscription Feature Gating Matrix › GROWTH Plan unlocks Loyalty & Campaigns, but gates Pro features
Subscription Feature Gating Matrix › PRO Plan unlocks all capabilities
API Security & Abuse Protection Audits › Brute-force protection: Login rate limits after 5 failures
API Security & Abuse Protection Audits › Input bounds validation: Reject invalid visits payloads
Tenant Isolation Verification Matrix › Cross-tenant API request header manipulation is BLOCKED
Tenant Isolation Verification Matrix › Direct URL ID parameter manipulation is BLOCKED
Tenant Isolation Verification Matrix › Search filtering prevents cross-tenant data leakage
UX Operational & Heuristic Audits › Usability: Loading Skeletons render during navigation transition
UX Operational & Heuristic Audits › Usability: Double-click submission protection is enforced
UX Operational & Heuristic Audits › Usability: Error messages are clean, sanitized, and contain correlation IDs
Visual Regression Matrix › Capture and verify login page visual state
Visual Regression Matrix › Authenticated viewports layouts check › Verify visual layout for: dashboard
Visual Regression Matrix › Authenticated viewports layouts check › Verify visual layout for: customers
Visual Regression Matrix › Authenticated viewports layouts check › Verify visual layout for: customer-detail
Visual Regression Matrix › Authenticated viewports layouts check › Verify visual layout for: visits
Visual Regression Matrix › Authenticated viewports layouts check › Verify visual layout for: loyalty
Visual Regression Matrix › Authenticated viewports layouts check › Verify visual layout for: automations
Visual Regression Matrix › Authenticated viewports layouts check › Verify visual layout for: governance
Campaign Management & ROI Workflow › E2E Campaign Dispatch, Duplicate Protection, and ROI Computation

testcase.name: Loyalty Progression & Reward Redemption Workflow › E2E Reward Unlock and Redemption
Autonomous Governance: KPI Math & Scenario Correctness › E2E Cohort Calculations match Live UI Segment Stats
testcase.system-out: Seeding synthetic customer cohorts... Executing daily_intelligence recalculation pipeline... Navigating to Intelligence tab...

KPI Integrity Dashboard Audits › UI KPI StatCards match database aggregates

Subscription Feature Gating Matrix › STARTER Plan gates premium features

Subscription Feature Gating Matrix › PRO Plan unlocks all capabilities
API Security & Abuse Protection Audits › Brute-force protection: Login rate limits after 5 failures
API Security & Abuse Protection Audits › Input bounds validation: Reject invalid visits payloads
Tenant Isolation Verification Matrix › Cross-tenant API request header manipulation is BLOCKED
Tenant Isolation Verification Matrix › Direct URL ID parameter manipulation is BLOCKED
Tenant Isolation Verification Matrix › Search filtering prevents cross-tenant data leakage
